# tfe_policy_set

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `kind` (String) The policy-as-code framework for the policy. Valid values are sentinel and opa
- `organization` (String)
- `overridable` (Boolean) Whether users can override this policy when it fails during a run. Only valid for OPA policies

### Read-Only

- `agent_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the policy set is executed in the HCP Terraform agent. True by default for OPA policies
- `description` (String)
- `excluded_workspace_ids` (Set of String)
- `global` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `policies_path` (String)
- `policy_ids` (Set of String)
- `policy_tool_version` (String) The policy tool version to run the policy evaluation against
- `policy_update_patterns` (List of String)
- `project_ids` (Set of String)
- `vcs_repo` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vcs_repo))
- `workspace_ids` (Set of String)

<a id="nestedatt--vcs_repo"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vcs_repo`

Read-Only:

- `branch` (String)
- `github_app_installation_id` (String)
- `identifier` (String)
- `ingress_submodules` (Boolean)
- `oauth_token_id` (String)
